title: Session schemas
description: Track session, setup snapshots, and change log data shapes for the Dialed platform

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

TireSnapshot.description: Tire specification snapshot at session time (brand, compound, age). Recorded separately for front and rear.

compound.description: Compound designation (e.g. SC1, SC2, Medium, Soft)

laps.description: Number of laps on this tire at the start of the session

Session.description: A single on-track session within a track event. A session has a type (practice, qualifying, etc.) and captures lap times from two sources: manual rider entry and CSV logger data.

event_id.description: ID of the track event this session belongs to

user_id.description: ID of the rider who participated in this session

session_type.description: The type of session. Affects how lap times are compared and displayed.

manual_best_lap_ms.description: Best lap time in milliseconds as entered manually by the rider. Preserved as a fallback when no logger data is available.

csv_best_lap_ms.description: Best lap time in milliseconds extracted from the CSV data logger file. More accurate than manual entry — displayed preferentially when available.

tire_front.description: Front tire specification at the start of this session

tire_rear.description: Rear tire specification at the start of this session

rider_feedback.description: Free-text rider notes about how the bike felt during this session (used as AI context)

voice_note_url.description: URL of an audio voice note in blob storage. Transcribed by the voice ingestion pipeline.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this session was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this session was last modified

SetupSnapshot.description: An immutable snapshot of a bike's suspension settings at a point in time during a session. Append-only — never updated. Each save creates a new row, building a history of setup changes throughout the day.

session_id.description: ID of the session this snapshot belongs to

settings.description: Full suspension spec at the time this snapshot was taken. Validated against the SuspensionSpec schema.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this snapshot was saved. Defines the ordering of snapshots within a session.

ChangeLog.description: A single setting change made between or during sessions. Provides the AI with a structured history of what was tried and why.

session_id.description: ID of the session in which this change was made

parameter.description: Name of the setting that was changed (e.g. 'front.compression', 'rear.rebound', 'rear.preload')

from_value.description: Previous value of the parameter before this change. Null if the previous value was not recorded.

to_value.description: New value of the parameter after this change

rationale.description: Why this change was made (rider notes, AI suggestion reference, mechanic recommendation)

applied_at.description: Timestamp when this change was applied
